layout_and_spacing.generous_spacing: Use p-6 to p-12 for containers, py-20 to py-32 for sections.
layout_and_spacing.landing_grid: MODE A: The 'Tetris' Grid. Use grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-8 lg:grid-cols-12 with gap-8 to gap-12.
layout_and_spacing.dashboard_grid: MODE B: The 'Control Room' Grid. grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 with gap-4 or gap-6.
layout_and_spacing.card_style: Flat background, 1px subtle border (border-border), no shadow by default. Hover: slight lift (-translate-y-1), subtle shadow (shadow-lg).
layout_and_spacing.glassmorphism: For sticky headers: bg-white/70, backdrop-blur-xl, border-b border-white/40.

components.navigation: Sticky header with glassmorphism for landing page. Solid sidebar/header for dashboards.
components.cards: Cardless or sharp rectangular edges. Minimal border radius (rounded-none or max rounded-md).
components.forms: Shadcn components heavily customized to match the Swiss design (flat inputs, bold labels, 1px borders).
components.tables: Shadcn tables with strong readability, generous row spacing, and status colors (red/green/neutral).
components.charts: Shadcn/Recharts line and bar charts. Avoid complex visualizations. Keep calm and whitespace-heavy layouts.
components.testing: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid (e.g., data-testid='login-submit-button').

image_urls.description: Modern university campus building, use as hero section background on landing page.
Student sitting in front of laptop, use for Student feature section or dashboard.
Professionals discussing in an office, use for Mock Interview or TPO feature section.

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Always explicitly set text color on hover. Active state color must have a lighter hue of hover state.
motion_and_interactions.focus_states: Higher contrast than default state. focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary focus:ring-offset-2.
motion_and_interactions.transitions: Specific properties only. e.g., transition-transform duration-200 ease-out.

instructions_to_main_agent: Ensure 'Made with Emergent' branding is completely removed from all pages.
Install and use 'lucide-react' for all icons.
Use Shadcn UI for all interactive components. Do not use raw HTML for select, inputs, dialogs, tabs.
Implement Role-Based Access Control (Student, HOD, TPO) with JWT-like behavior using DEMO AI responses.
Landing page should be visually distinct from the dashboard, using the Tetris Grid bento layouts.
Dashboard must utilize the Control Room grid pattern with dense information architecture.
Include 'data-testid' attributes on ALL clickable buttons, form inputs, links, and key metric displays.
Do not use emojis anywhere in the UI. Keep it strictly professional.
For the ATS score and readiness visualizer, use Shadcn Charts or Recharts (gauge/radial/donut chart).
